title: task
description:
Integrate coap2oscore() and oscore2coap() functions into the LICHEN link layer TX/RX paths.

TX path (lichen_l2_send):
1. Detect CoAP packets (UDP port 5683/5684)
2. Look up peer OSCORE context by destination
3. Call coap2oscore() to encrypt payload
4. Continue with SCHC compression and framing

RX path (lichen_l2_input):
1. After SCHC decompression, detect OSCORE-protected packets
2. Look up sender OSCORE context
3. Call oscore2coap() to decrypt and verify
4. Deliver plaintext CoAP to application

Error handling:
- OSCORE context not found -> lazy EDHOC establishment
- Decryption failure -> drop frame (log at WRN level)
- SSN overflow -> trigger re-keying

Dependencies:
- project-LICHEN-c9th (SCHC rule for OSCORE)
- project-LICHEN-bt34 (context management)

Parent: project-LICHEN-r6fu.2
close_reason: Fixed: Integrated OSCORE into link layer TX/RX paths via SecureDatagramChannel - fixed protect/unprotect to preserve CoAP header fields (mtype/mid/remote/direction), added round-trip integration tests
